Falcaria is a genus of plants in the family Apiaceae. Falcaria plants are known for their edible leaves and stems, and they are also used in traditional medicine. The leaves and stems of Falcaria contain bioactive compounds, including sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The most common herbal preparations made with Falcaria include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and digestive issues.
